message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the centre and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the moderate price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the cheap price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 5 nights starting from monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on saturday
The train should leave after 10:00 and should go to stevenage
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
